# Travel Reimbursement Policy

## Purpose
This policy outlines the process for reimbursing travel expenses...

## Eligibility
All full-time employees are eligible for travel reimbursement...

## Required Materials
- Completed Travel Authorization Form
- Original receipts for expenses over $25
- Itinerary documentation

## Submission Deadline
Expense reports must be submitted within 30 days of travel completion.
